connectors.name: Mogul
connectors.tagline: Catalog, master recordings & royalty source of truth
connectors.description: The live royalty connector. Lode reads your full catalog, master ownership, and royalty statements over MCP, then flags neighboring-rights gaps and missing payouts.

capabilities_schema.label: Read catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Let Lode read your full catalog and master ownership.

capabilities_schema.label: Read royalty statements
capabilities_schema.description: Pull statements across connected sources to reconcile earnings.

capabilities_schema.label: Flag missing money
capabilities_schema.description: Surface unregistered rights and uncollected payouts.

capabilities_schema.label: Draft registrations
capabilities_schema.description: Prepare ASCAP/BMI/SoundExchange registrations for missing rights.

agent_action.label: Audit my catalog for missing money
agent_action.prompt: Audit my Mogul catalog for missing money and unregistered neighboring rights.

connectors.name: Suno
connectors.description: Bring finished songs and stems straight into your catalog. Lode keeps new Suno releases in sync with Mogul so every track is tracked, owned, and monetized from day one.

capabilities_schema.label: Import releases
capabilities_schema.description: Pull finished Suno songs into your catalog.

capabilities_schema.label: Export stems & masters
capabilities_schema.description: Retrieve stems and masters for downstream use.

capabilities_schema.label: Sync to catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Register imported releases in Mogul automatically.

connectors.name: Untitled
connectors.tagline: Your private library — projects, playlists & collaborators
connectors.description: The home of your working catalog. Lode reads your Untitled library and playlists so every track you've made is visible in your dashboard — and one ask away from a registration or a sync pitch.

capabilities_schema.label: Read your library
capabilities_schema.description: Let Lode see the tracks and versions in your Untitled library.

capabilities_schema.label: Read playlists
capabilities_schema.description: Use your playlist organization when matching, pitching, and registering.

capabilities_schema.label: Import tracks to catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Register library tracks in Mogul so they're owned and tracked.

capabilities_schema.label: Share listening links
capabilities_schema.description: Create private listening links to attach to pitches.

agent_action.label: Find sync-ready tracks in my library
agent_action.prompt: Look through my Untitled library and tell me which playlists and tracks are the strongest candidates for this week's sync briefs. Cite each track's sound profile.

connectors.name: Samply
connectors.description: Fast, private track sharing for works-in-progress. Lode reads listening stats and collaborator feedback to tell you which unreleased tracks are landing — before you spend on a release.

capabilities_schema.label: Read listening stats
capabilities_schema.description: See plays and drop-off on your shared works-in-progress.

capabilities_schema.label: Read collaborator feedback
capabilities_schema.description: Use comments and reactions to prioritize what to finish.

capabilities_schema.label: Share tracks
capabilities_schema.description: Create and send private share links on your behalf.

connectors.name: Disco
connectors.tagline: Pitch your catalog into live sync briefs — film, TV, ads & brands
connectors.description: The demand side. Lode reads active sync briefs, matches your catalog by mood, tempo and genre, drafts and tracks pitches, and pipes expected placement fees back into your Mogul forecast — turning missing money into new money.

capabilities_schema.label: Read active briefs
capabilities_schema.description: Pull live sync briefs from film, TV, ad and brand buyers.

capabilities_schema.label: Match catalog to briefs
capabilities_schema.description: Match your tracks to briefs by mood, tempo and genre.

capabilities_schema.label: Draft pitches
capabilities_schema.description: Write a pitch for the best-matched brief on your behalf.

capabilities_schema.label: Auto-submit pitches
capabilities_schema.description: Submit pitches to buyers without a human approval step.

agent_action.label: Pitch my catalog into this week's briefs
agent_action.prompt: Pitch my catalog into this week's active sync briefs and forecast the placement royalties.

connectors.name: Spotify for Artists
connectors.description: Stream counts, playlist adds, and listener geography — context Lode uses to prioritize which tracks to pitch and register first.

capabilities_schema.label: Read stream analytics
capabilities_schema.description: See plays, saves, and release performance across your catalog.

capabilities_schema.label: Track playlist adds
capabilities_schema.description: Follow playlist placements and removals as they happen.

capabilities_schema.label: Read audience geography
capabilities_schema.description: Use listener locations to prioritize registrations and pitches.

connectors.name: DistroKid
connectors.description: Deliver releases to every store and surface release metadata so Lode can reconcile what's live against what's earning.

capabilities_schema.label: Read releases & stores
capabilities_schema.description: See what's live in which stores, and reconcile against earnings.

capabilities_schema.label: Read split metadata
capabilities_schema.description: Use collaborator splits when reconciling who is owed what.

capabilities_schema.label: Deliver releases
capabilities_schema.description: Send new releases to stores on your behalf.

connectors.name: ASCAP
connectors.description: Register works and collect performance royalties. Lode drafts and submits registrations on your behalf.

capabilities_schema.label: Read registered works
capabilities_schema.description: See which works are registered and which are missing.

capabilities_schema.label: Read performance royalties
capabilities_schema.description: Pull statements to reconcile what ASCAP has paid.

capabilities_schema.label: Register works
capabilities_schema.description: Draft and submit work registrations on your behalf.

connectors.name: SoundExchange
connectors.description: Collect digital performance royalties for master owners — the home of the neighboring-rights money Lode surfaces in Today.

capabilities_schema.label: Read payout history
capabilities_schema.description: See digital-performance payouts for your masters.

capabilities_schema.label: Register masters
capabilities_schema.description: Register sound recordings so they start collecting.

capabilities_schema.label: Claim neighboring rights
capabilities_schema.description: File claims for the unregistered rights Lode finds.

connectors.name: Songtradr
connectors.description: List your catalog on the largest B2B music licensing marketplace as a second sync channel alongside Disco.

capabilities_schema.label: Read marketplace demand
capabilities_schema.description: See active enterprise licensing opportunities.

capabilities_schema.label: List catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Publish tracks to the marketplace on your behalf.

capabilities_schema.label: Manage listings
capabilities_schema.description: Update pricing and availability for listed tracks.
